creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Just had a hunch! Both builds were in a jail.

Just tried building on the host and the build was OK... Same CFLAGS
and CPUTYPE on the host env and using clang.

Does that help? (got confirmation from someone else on
##FreeBSD/freenode that he has this failure in a jail as well)

On Sun, Oct 14, 2012 at 4:27 PM, Ryan Steinmetz <zi@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Please comment out the CFLAGS/CPUTYPE lines and try the clang build
> again.
